# scripts

> The official home of Opal scripts: a gallery of ready-to-run examples, a
> TypeScript template, and a CI-gated contribution pipeline. One folder per
> script under `scripts/<id>/`; canonical API typings and a shared test stub
> live in `packages/`; `template/` is the copy-to-start scaffold.

Use raw/permalink URLs (`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/<path>`)
so a fetcher gets file content, not a rendered page.

## Docs

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/README.md): Overview, layout, install/create-a-script instructions, CI gates, full script table.
- [CLAUDE.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/CLAUDE.md): AI guide — mental model, manifest schema, tools, test isolation model, pitfalls.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to add a script, PR workflow, review criteria, commit policy.
- [SECURITY.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/SECURITY.md): Sandbox model and vulnerability reporting.
- [CHANGELOG.md](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/CHANGELOG.md): Released and unreleased changes.

## Shared packages

- [opal-globals.d.ts](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/packages/opal-types/opal-globals.d.ts): Canonical ambient type definitions for every scripting proxy global, including `storage`.
- [packages/stub/index.js](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/packages/stub/index.js): `createOpalStub()` — the shared sandbox stub every script's tests run against.
- [template/](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/template/src/main.ts): Copy-to-start TypeScript scaffold — a minimal typed script with settings, rendering, and `storage`.

## Scripts (scripts/<id>/)

- [`chomp`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/chomp/src/main.ts) ★ flagship (ui): Roguelite arcade micro-game for the command palette — rounds, perks, elites, mutators, meta progression, backed by a 326-check deterministic test harness.
- [`milestone-toasts`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/milestone-toasts/src/MilestoneToasts.js) (core): Edge-triggered toast notifications for fall survival, low/full health, and sprint streaks.
- [`packet-no-fall`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/packet-no-fall/src/PacketNoFall.js) (character): Rewrites the movement packet's `onGround` flag while falling, rate-limited with `timer`.
- [`reaction-tester`](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opalclient/scripts/main/scripts/reaction-tester/src/ReactionTester.js) (ui): A reflex-timing mini-game hosted in the command palette.

## Optional

- [Issues](https://github.com/opalclient/scripts/issues)
- [Discussions](https://github.com/opalclient/scripts/discussions)
